manure.title: Manure data
manure.description: You thought it's a waste, but those crops need to eat as well

field_management.title: Field Management Configuration
field_management.description: Fertilizer, manure, and tillage application schedules

start_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

end_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

graphic_dir.description: The location of the output graphics directory

output_dir.description: The location of the output directory

simulate_animals.description: Whether or not to simulate animals during the simulation

calf_num.description: The average number of pre-weaned calves (head)

cow_num.description: The number of dry and lactating cows (head)

heiferI_num.description: HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding (head)

heiferII_num.description: HeiferII is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy (head)

heiferIII_num_springers.description: HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers (head)

herd_init.description: Whether or not to initialize a herd if the milk prod and body weight numbers are exceedingly abnormal

herd_num.description: The number of lactating and milking cows on farm (head)

breed.description: The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein - HO or Jersey - JE)

crop_species.description: Name of the crop being grown.

harvest_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to harvest

harvest_years.description: Calendar years in which the harvesting occurs

harvest_operations.description: Operation(s) with which this crop will be harvested.

harvest_type.description: Whether the crop uses scheduled harvests or optimal harvests

planting_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to plant

planting_years.description: Calendar years in which the planting occurs

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this crop schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

fertilizer_schedule_properties.description: Defines the schedule of fertilizer applications for a field.

available_fertilizer_mixes.description: All the available fertilizer mixes that are available besides the default ones.

mix_names.description: List of the mix names that will be used for the corresponding fertilizer application.

years.description: List of years in which fertilizer will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which fertilizer will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description: List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.

phosphorus_masses.description: List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.

potassium_masses.description: List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.

application_depths.description: List of depths at which the fertilizer is injected into the soil.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of fertilizer which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this fertilizer application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

manure_schedule_properties.description: Defines the schedule of manure applications for a field.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description: List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.

phosphorus_masses.description: List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.

potassium_masses.description: List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.

coverage_fractions.description: List of fractions of how much of the field is covered by the corresponding manure application.

application_depths.description: List of depths at which the manure is injected into the soil.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of manure which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this manure application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

tillage_schedule_properties.description: Defines the schedule of tillage applications for a field.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

tillage_depths.description: List of depths that the corresponding tillage applications reach.

incorporation_fractions.description: List of fractions of surface pools that get incorporated into the soil during applications.

mixing_fractions.description: List of fractions of soil layer pools that are available to mix into other soil layers.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this tillage schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

natural_gas_cost_kwh.description: cost of natural gas per kwh

alfalfa_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from alfalfa tillage

corn_grain_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn grain tillage

corn_silage_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn silage tillage

entry.description: the entry number of the feed

units.description: the unit the feed is measured in

second_moisture_condition_parameter.description: Curve number parameter for average moisture condition equation.

average_subbasin_slope.description: Slope of the field, measured as rise over run.

support_practice_factor.description: Ratio of soil loss with a specific support practice based on slope characteristics.
support_practice_factor.notes: This value adjusts for terracing, contouring, and stripcropping, and these features are not present in V1, so this value IS NOT used.

albedo.description: Ratio of solar radiation reflected by soil to amount of incident upon it.

initial_residue.description: Amount of residue present on the soil surface at the start of the simulation.

soil_cover_type.description: Type of soil cover at the beginning of the simulation.

soil_evaporation_compensation_coefficien.description: Modifies depth distribution used to meet soil evaporative demand.

soil_layers.description: The soil layers that this profile contains. Each element of the array should be a `soil_layer` object.

soil_layer_properties.description: This represents a single soil layer.

bottom_depth.description: Bottom depth of this soil layer.

soil_water_concentration.description: Concentration of water in this layer at the beginning of the simulation.

field_capacity_water_concentration.description: Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.

wilting_point_water_concentration.description: Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.

saturation_point_water_concentration.description: Concentration of water in a layer when it has become saturated.

temperature.description: Temperature of the layer at the beginning of the simulation.

saturated_hydraulic_conductivity.description: Measure of ease of water movement through the soil.

bulk_density.description: Ratio of mass of solid particles to total volume of soil.
bulk_density.units: Megagrams / cubic meter or grams / cubic centimeter

percent_organic_carbon_content.description: Percent of soil weight that is organic carbon.

percent_clay_content.description: Percent of soil weight that is clay.

percent_silt_content.description: Percent of soil weight that is silt.

percent_sand_content.description: Percent of soil weight that is sand.

percent_rock_content.description: Percent of soil weight that is rock.

initial_labile_inorganic_phosphorus_conc.description: Concentration of labile inorganic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.

initial_fresh_organic_phosphorus_concent.description: Concentration of fresh organic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.

initial_soil_nitrate_concentration.description: Concentration of nitrate in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.

initial_soil_ammonium_concentration.description: Concentration of ammonium in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.

humus_mineralization_rate_factor.description: Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P).

denitrification_threshold_water_content.description: Fraction of field capacity water content above which denitrification takes place.

residue_fresh_organic_mineralization_rat.description: Fraction of residue that will decompose in a day given optimal conditions.
